title: Network Service
description: Browser-aware network utilities: online/offline status signal, file uploads and downloads with progress tracking, cancellation, and typed status events built on Angular HttpClient.
imports: import { AXNetworkService, AXUploadTask, AXDownloadTask, AXUploadStatus, AXDownloadStatus, AXUploadResponse, AXDownloadResponse } from '@acorex/core/network';

hints.title: No extra packages
hints.content: AXNetworkService is providedIn: 'root'. You only need provideHttpClient() — do not import @acorex/core/platform or other core packages for basic uploads/downloads.

hints.title: HttpClient required
hints.content: Register provideHttpClient() (or HttpClientModule) in your app config. AXNetworkService injects Angular HttpClient internally.

hints.title: Upload needs start()
hints.content: After creating an AXUploadTask, subscribe to task.events then call task.start(). Downloads begin when you subscribe to task.events — no separate start method.

hints.title: Online status is browser-only
hints.content: status tracks window online/offline events. On the server it defaults to true and does not update.

hints.title: Progress from File sizes
hints.content: Upload progress percent is calculated from the total File.size sum inside FormData. Non-file FormData entries do not contribute to totalBytes.

types.title: AXNetworkService
types.description: Root singleton for connectivity monitoring and transfer tasks.

props.name: status
props.description: Readonly signal — true when online, false when offline (browser only).

methods.content:
/**
 * Creates an upload task. Does not start the HTTP request until task.start().
 * @overload upload(url, formData)
 * @overload upload(httpRequest)
 */
upload<T>(url: string, formData: FormData): AXUploadTask<T>
upload<T>(request: HttpRequest<any>): AXUploadTask<T>

/**
 * Creates a download task. HTTP stream starts on first subscription to task.events.
 * @overload download(url)
 * @overload download(httpRequest)
 */
download(url: string): AXDownloadTask
download(request: HttpRequest<Blob>): AXDownloadTask

types.title: AXUploadTask<T>
types.description: Handles a single upload with progress events and cancellation.

props.name: events
props.description: Hot stream of upload progress and final result. Subscribe before start().

methods.content:
/**
 * Begins the HttpClient request pipeline.
 */
start(): void

/**
 * Aborts the in-flight upload via takeUntil.
 */
cancel(): void

types.title: AXDownloadTask
types.description: Handles a single blob download with progress events and cancellation.

props.name: events
props.description: Cold-to-hot stream — subscribing triggers the download.

methods.content:
/**
 * Unsubscribes from the download stream.
 */
cancel(): void

types.title: AXUploadResponse<T>
types.description: Payload emitted on each upload event.

props.name: result?
props.description: Server JSON body when status is UploadComplete.

props.name: message?
props.description: Error message when status is UploadFailed.

types.title: AXDownloadResponse
types.description: Payload emitted on each download event.

props.name: totalBytes
props.description: Expected total from Content-Length when available.

props.name: data?
props.description: Downloaded blob when status is DownloadComplete.

content.data:
The @acorex/core/network package wraps Angular HttpClient for file transfers with progress reporting:

• AXNetworkService.status — reactive online/offline signal
• upload() — returns AXUploadTask with BehaviorSubject events
• download() — returns AXDownloadTask with Observable events

Designed for integration with @acorex/cdk/uploader and custom progress UIs (progress bars, loading dialogs).

sections.title: Basic Usage
sections.description: Register HttpClient once, then inject AXNetworkService to read connectivity and create upload/download tasks.

sections.title: Upload a File
sections.description: Basic upload with progress and completion handling.

sections.title: Upload with HttpRequest
sections.description: Custom headers, method, or response type.

sections.title: Download a File
sections.description: Track download progress and save the blob.

sections.title: Download with Loading Dialog
sections.description: Real pattern from the showcase uploader page.

sections.title: Upload vs Download API Differences
sections.description: Key behavioral differences between task types.

content.data:
| Feature | AXUploadTask | AXDownloadTask |
|---------|--------------|----------------|
| events type | BehaviorSubject | Observable (getter) |
| Start transfer | Call start() explicitly | Subscribe to events |
| Response body | JSON (generic T) | Blob |
| Progress basis | Sum of File sizes in FormData | HttpEvent loaded/total |
| Cancel | takeUntil on HttpClient stream | Unsubscribe from events |

Both tasks enable reportProgress on the underlying HttpRequest.

sections.title: Status Enum Reference
sections.description: When each status value is emitted.

content.data:
Upload statuses:
• StartingUpload — request sent / headers received
• Uploading — HttpEventType.UploadProgress
• UploadComplete — HttpEventType.Response with JSON body in result
• UploadFailed — HTTP error (message from statusText)
• UploadCanceled — after cancel() is called

Download statuses:
• StartingDownload — before first progress event
• Downloading — HttpEventType.DownloadProgress
• DownloadComplete — response body available as data Blob
• DownloadFailed — defined in enum but errors propagate via Observable error callback
